images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model exuding a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured on a rainy day in a rooftop parking lot. She is dressed in a trendy, form-fitting silky loungewear set that clings to her fit, curvy body, accentuating her slim waist and ample chest, the smooth fabric texture contrasting with the glistening rain. She holds a coffee cup in one hand while shielding herself with an umbrella, tilting her head back in a cute, contagious yawn, her large expressive eyes half-closed and lips parted. The scene is bathed in warm, golden vintage tones, utilizing bright Rembrandt lighting to highlight her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair without heavy shadows. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the drone aerial view captures the entire aesthetic composition with depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination, creating a sharp, high-fashion masterpiece.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
